titleStmt.title: SII 20.185: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 185. (B.K. No. 41 of 1937-38.) KŪḌIGI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Nandi pillar in front of the temple of Basavaṇṇa.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the king's regnal year 11, Durmati, Pushya, śu. 11, Monday, Uttārayaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1201, December 23. The weekday was, however, Sunday.
The inscription begins with the vachana of Kapilasiddha-Mallikārjuna and records a gift for the benefit of the temple of Kapilasiddha-Mallikārjuna by Daṇḍanāyaka Sōvadēva, Māyidēva-nāyaka and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīyōṁ jaya paramēśvara paramātma Ī
svaranurvvīpavviyaḍaṁ
gikoṇḍippanōrvvaṇnigeyāgi
yōgigaḷa manada koneya jyōtīsvara
nuṁ vriṣabhana rūpāge yajamānanuṁ yā
cāryyanuṁ tāneyāgi yōgādisaṁpaṁ
nakhaḷeyaṁgaḷellavaṁ saṁpādi� yōga
ramaṇiya kṣētravaṁ taḷaviṭṭu salākheviḍidu
yabhinavaśrīśaiḷava māḍi kapi
lasiddhamallikārjunadēvaraṁ nelasi niṁ
du(ṁ) puṇyapāpaṁgaḷaṁ baravē
ḷdu baṁdu viṁ besa dēvāyenalu yī
sthānadalu mā(ṁ)nyavāgi vūrugaḷa bhūmi
gaḷa dhanaṁgaḷa yī liṁgake hastōdakaṁ mā
ḍi koṭṭaduvaṁ manaṁ pēsade kaḷadukoṁḍa
peneṁbātana yātana mātā mātāpi
trugaḷellara yeppattukōṭivarṣaṁbaraṁ pu
ḷugoṇḍada narakadoḷage nīnāhuti
goḷuttaviru kaṁḍā yale pāpavē Ī
dēvana bhūmi dhanakkānaṁjuveneṁdu
paṁdeyaṁ pāvaḍardaṁte manaṁ bedaṟi poḍavaṭṭa
naṁ bēga sīghraṁ koṁḍu bā kaṇḍā ya
le puṇyavē kaviḷāsakke Inteṟa
ḍaṟa beṁge puṇyapāpaṁgaḷu
pārddukoṇḍirdoyvudu diṭha
diṭha�sa
© svasti samadhitapaṁcamahāsabda
dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvara viṣṇuvaṁ
śōdbhava yādavakuḷakamaḷaka
ḷikāvikāsabhāskara rāyanārāyaṇa
pratāpacakravartti jaytapāḷadēvava
rśada 11 neya durmmati saṁvatsarada
pusya suddha 11 sōmavāra vyatīpāta
Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtiyalu svasti © . © . © .
samastarājyabharanirūpita mahāmātyapada
vīvirājamānamānōṁnnata prabhumaṁtrōtpā
hasakritrayasaṁpannanuṁ rājya
worn out
paṭṭasāṇādhipati
dēvadaṁḍanāyakaru sōmadēvadaṁḍanāya
karu pramukhakaraṇaṁ māyidēvanāyaka
ru Abhinava śrīśaiḷakapilasiddhamallināthadēva
ra Aṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōgajīrṇṇōddhāraa
vāricchatrakke ḷiya grā
ḍeyaṁ sarvasamasyaṁ māḍi caṁdrārkkatā
raṁbaraṁ salvantāgi dhārapūrvvakaṁ māḍi
biṭṭaru maṁgaḷa mahā śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.185 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
